pendingApplications.proposal: Variation of Conditions 2 (approved plans) and 13 ( Sustainibility Measures) pursuant to planning permission (ref: 3/25/0014/VAR/Dated 10/10/2025) for (Variation of condition 2 (approved plans) pursuant to planning permission 3/23/0681/FUL dated 03.01.2025 (for: Change of use of land and the erection of 9 dwellings, with associated landscaping, vehicular access and parking).
